refnamediv.refpurpose: a lightweight keyboard and mouse configuration utility

refsect1.title: DESCRIPTION
refsect1.para: lxinput is a graphical program designed to configure basic keyboard and mouse behavior preferences, such as character repeat delay, cursor speed, and mouse button tracking behaviors.

It serves as the default hardware preferences front-end for the LXDE desktop environment. Values adjusted inside this utility are synchronized to disk profiles which are parsed and handled by the session manager (lxsession) at runtime.

refsect1.title: AUTHOR
refsect1.para: This manual page was originally written by paulliu grandpaul@gmail.com for the Debian system (but may be used by others). On Debian systems, the complete text of the GNU General Public License can be found in /usr/share/common-licenses/GPL.
